---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is this related to a problem you experienced?**
A clear description of what the limitation or pain point is. [e.g. "The system doesn't handle X when..."]

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What behavior or capability would you want?

**Spec section (if applicable)**
Which section(s) would be affected? [e.g. §8 COLD Partitioning, §20 Recovery]

**Platform context**
Which platform did you encounter this on? [Claude Desktop / ChatGPT / GPT Web / Other]

**Additional context**
Any examples, references, or related issues.
